full_text:
Fu Qian (Zishen) 服虔 (子慎)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fu Qian (服虔), styledZishen (子慎), was born in Henan. A noted scholar, one of his works circulating for several hundred years. Backed Tao Qian’s petition. Fu Qian was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Fu Qian lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
